evidence: C2 assist flags surfacing + client resolution UX. views.py: result frame carries flags (dataclasses.asdict) + serialized catalogue when AssistResult has flags; PlanCreateView.post persists request-catalogue-addition entries as Flag rows (is_resolved=False) in the plan-save transaction. ai-assist.js: applyFlags maps each flag to its DOM row by reusing the existing prefill->row navigation (parsing the spec-prose field), marks it, and renders accept / replace-from-catalogue / request-addition; wired into the 11 run*Assist result handlers + a submit hook serializing flag_requests_json. New tests: test_assist_stream (frame carries/omits flags+catalogue), test_create_view (request-addition persists + oversize skipped), jstests/flag-surfacing (addressing top-level+nested, the 3 affordances, replace-substitutes, accept-clears). Iterate-to-zero loop 1: the first audit found _save_flag_requests could 500 on a valid-JSON oversize entry (DataError uncaught, and a bare full_clean would fail the whole create at the post-level except); fixed by per-entry full_clean inside a LOCAL try/except ValidationError:continue (skip the entry, create proceeds) -- restores no-500 on both DBs. Hardening side effect: entries lacking spec_key are skipped (no live flow produces them; server always sets spec_key). Re-audit Total findings: 0. Full gate GREEN: ruff check + ruff format --check (project + the 3 dispatch files), mypy . 317/0, pytest 1997, make test-js 48/0, verify-render-parity 14/14. No model/migration/parser change; reuses C1 Flag.

criteria_results.criterion: When an assist response carries flags, those flags are delivered to the client (not dropped from the response).
Each flagged element is marked in the UI on the specific element it concerns, so the user sees which element is flagged.
For each flag, the user can accept it, replace the flagged value with a catalogued one, or request that the value be added to the catalogue.
A flagged element presents an actionable signal to the admin, not a generic error.
The full project gate stays green.
